entries.content: xterm.js theme update requires forced refresh with slight delay when allowTransparency is enabled
entries.content_normalized: xtermjs theme update requires forced refresh with slight delay when allowtransparency is enabled

entries.content: Modified FileExplorer to support creating new files in addition to folders. Added backend SFTP create_file support.
entries.content_normalized: modified fileexplorer to support creating new files in addition to folders added backend sftp create_file support

entries.content: Added SFTP file editing (dbl-click to edit) with 10MB limit and UTF-8 check. Implemented via straightforward overlay editor in FileExplorer.
entries.content_normalized: added sftp file editing dbl-click to edit with 10mb limit and utf-8 check implemented via straightforward overlay editor in fileexplorer

entries.content: Refactored SFTP editing to use a new Tauri WebviewWindow (?mode=editor) instead of an overlay. Removed Overlay UI from FileExplorer.
entries.content_normalized: refactored sftp editing to use a new tauri webviewwindow mode=editor instead of an overlay removed overlay ui from fileexplorer

entries.content: Terminal refactoring: Implemented backend MPSC buffering (60Hz) and frontend optimization with useShallow/React.memo to handle high-frequency SSH output and prevent UI freezing.
entries.content_normalized: terminal refactoring implemented backend mpsc buffering 60hz and frontend optimization with useshallow/reactmemo to handle high-frequency ssh output and prevent ui freezing

entries.content: Next.js / Frontend optimization: Use `useShallow` from `zustand/react/shallow` for selectors that return objects/arrays to avoid re-renders. Wrap heavy components in `React.memo`.
entries.content_normalized: nextjs / frontend optimization use `useshallow` from `zustand/react/shallow` for selectors that return objects/arrays to avoid re-renders wrap heavy components in `reactmemo`

entries.content: Zustand v5: Use `useStoreWithEqualityFn` from `zustand/traditional` for custom equality selectors, as `useStore` no longer supports the equalityFn argument.
entries.content_normalized: zustand v5 use `usestorewithequalityfn` from `zustand/traditional` for custom equality selectors as `usestore` no longer supports the equalityfn argument

entries.content: Terminal Performance: Completely decouple React view from high-frequency data streams (buffers) by using custom equality selectors in Zustand or memoizing components to ignore data-only updates. Let the terminal library (xterm.js) handle the rendering imperatively.
entries.content_normalized: terminal performance completely decouple react view from high-frequency data streams buffers by using custom equality selectors in zustand or memoizing components to ignore data-only updates let the terminal library xtermjs handle the rendering imperatively

entries.content: Dependency Management: When using `zustand/traditional` for `useStoreWithEqualityFn`, ensure `use-sync-external-store` is explicitly installed in dependencies, as it is a required peer dependency.
entries.content_normalized: dependency management when using `zustand/traditional` for `usestorewithequalityfn` ensure `use-sync-external-store` is explicitly installed in dependencies as it is a required peer dependency
